zh.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特布藍利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Dennis Foreman於1579年8月16日出生在英國英格蘭肯特布藍利時，她的父親Clement Forman31歲，母親Margery Baldock27歲。她於1596年5月24日與George Lewis在英國肯特布藍利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1626年1月10日在她的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國肯特布藍利。

zh-hans.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰肯特布藍利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dennis Foreman于1579年8月16日出生在英国英格兰肯特布藍利时，她的父亲Clement Forman31岁，母亲Margery Baldock27岁。她于1596年5月24日与George Lewis在英国肯特布藍利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1626年1月10日在她的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国肯特布藍利。

nameMeanings.name: Foreman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of North German Formann, a variant of Fuhrmann or Fohrman .

variants.name: Forman
meanings: English: status name for a leader or spokesman for a group, from Middle English fore-man ‘foreman, reeve’ (from the Old English prefix fore- ‘foremost’ + mann ‘man’). The word is attested in this sense from the 15th century, but is not used specifically for the leader of a gang of workers before the late 16th century.
English: variant of Fordman with loss of -d-, from Middle English ford ‘ford’ (Old English ford) + man, denoting either a dweller by or a keeper of a ford. Compare Forder .

nameMeanings.name: Dennis
meanings:
Corrupted from the name Dionysius. According to the Annals of Ireland the old 
Irish name Donnoch or Donnchu has been sometimes Anglicised to Denis.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Dennis Foreman was born on 16 August 1579, in Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Clement Forman, was 31 and her mother, Margery Baldock, was 27. She married George Lewis on 24 May 1596, in Brenchley, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 January 1626, in her hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Brenchley, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dennis Foreman est née le 16 août 1579, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Clement Forman, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margery Baldock, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé George Lewis le 24 mai 1596, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 janvier 1626, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dennis Foreman am 16. August 1579 in Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Clement Forman 31 und ihre Mutter Margery Baldock 27. Sie hat am 24. Mai 1596 in Brenchley, Kent, England George Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Januar 1626 im Alter von 46 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Brenchley, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dennis Foreman è nata il il 16 agosto 1579 nel Brenchley, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Clement Forman, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margery Baldock, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato George Lewis il 24 maggio 1596, nel Brenchley, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1626, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Brenchley, Kent, England.

ja.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスケントブレンチリー
ja.Brenchley, Kent, England: イギリスケントブレンチリー
ja.lifeSummary: Dennis Foremanが1579年8月16日にイギリスイギリスケントブレンチリーで生まれた時，父Clement Formanは31歳，母Margery Baldockは27歳であった。1596年5月24日にイギリスケントブレンチリーでGeorge Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1626年1月10日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスケントブレンチリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dennis Foreman(이)가 1579년 8월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 브렌클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Clement Forman(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Baldock(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1596년 5월 24일 영국 켄트 브렌클리에서 George Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1626년 1월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 브렌클리에 묻혔다.

pt.16 August 1579–10 January 1626: 16 de agosto de 1579–10 de janeiro de 1626
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dennis Foreman nasceu em 16 de agosto de 1579, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Clement Forman, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margery Baldock, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com George Lewis em 24 de maio de 1596, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1626, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dennis Foreman родилась 16 августа 1579 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Clement Forman было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Baldock, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Lewis 24 мая 1596 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 января 1626 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия.

es.16 August 1579–10 January 1626: 16 de agosto de 1579–10 de enero de 1626
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dennis Foreman nació el 16 de agosto de 1579, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Clement Forman, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margery Baldock, tenía 27 años. Se casó con George Lewis el 24 de mayo de 1596, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1626, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra.
